content.text: How can I programmatically replace every instance of a specific identifier string within an abstract syntax tree (AST)?
If a specific attribute contains a list, and one item in that list matches the ID, how does the code ensure all occurrences are replaced?

The function iterates through lists contained within attributes, checking if any element is identical to the target ID. When a match is found, it uses slice assignment (`attr[i:i+1] = replacement`) to handle both single entity replacements and list injections correctly.
I appreciate the detailed breakdown of the implementation.
